message:
fix(fusion): correct in_both_sources flag to require both lexical and semantic ranks

Move in_both_sources flag calculation from the per-source merge loops
to a dedicated final pass. The old code could incorrectly mark
duplicate doc IDs within a single source as appearing in both sources.
The new single-pass approach sets the flag only when a result has both
lexical_rank and semantic_rank populated.

Add test duplicate_doc_in_single_source_does_not_set_in_both_sources
to verify the fix and prevent regression.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
